metadata.description: A general marketplace of plugins, agents, and MCP servers organized by organization and team for Cursor IDE.

plugins.name: geni-plugin
plugins.description: Geni plugin via the Geni MCP server for querying Intel internal knowledge bases.

plugins.name: vdc-plugin
plugins.description: VDC plugin via the local VDC CLI MCP server for managing Intel Virtual Data Center resources.

plugins.name: trust-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server plugin exposing The Rapid Unit Selection Tool (TRUST) selected features via the Model Context Protocol.
